creator: freebsd.org@fydagy.netizen.se
text:
I never did manage to reverse engineer the seemingly undocumented FreeBSD release process. Thus without knowing which branch/commits to build, the bisecting never commenced. (I also tried obvious ideas such as `rgrep '14.1-RELEASE-p1' /usr/src`, but that returns empty.)

However suspend-resume works reliably again after an upgrade to 14.1-RELEASE-p5. So I guess someone did solve this. Great! Closing as FIXED. Please feel free to re-categorize as DUPLICATE or whatever if more appropriate.
